title: cacalia rufipilis
intro: Cacalia rufipilis, also known as the Redstem Cacalia, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cacalia rufipilis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tea for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures.
